title: .fleetrc.json
description: Per-repo defaults for Switchyard (@switchyardhq/switchyard). Precedence everywhere: CLI flag > .fleetrc.json > built-in default.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema, for editor autocomplete and validation.

defaultBase.description: Default base branch for `fleet spawn` when --from is not passed (built-in default: the current branch).

watchInterval.description: Default refresh interval for `fleet watch`, in seconds (built-in default: 3).

autoClean.description: Run a `fleet clean` sweep after every successful `fleet merge` (built-in default: false).

copyOnSpawn.description: Repo-root-relative files/directories copied into every new worktree by `fleet spawn` — the gitignored essentials a fresh worktree lacks (.env, …). Entries must stay inside the repository.

postSpawn.description: Shell command run inside a new worktree after `fleet spawn` (e.g. "npm ci"). A failing hook is reported but the worktree is kept.

preMerge.description: Shell command run inside the agent's worktree before `fleet merge` starts (e.g. "npm test"). A non-zero exit aborts the merge.
